overall.description: A first-person walk along a waterfront promenade at dusk in a game engine environment (resembling GTA V's Del Perro Pier). The camera moves steadily forward past a modern curved building and a large roller coaster structure, with the city skyline visible across the water as artificial lights begin to illuminate the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with roller coaster and modern pavilion

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beside a modern glass building with a roller coaster structure on the left

entered.detail: large curved metal roller coaster track structure running parallel to the path
curved modern building with reflective glass windows and a palm tree on top
metal safety railing separating the walkway from the water
concrete seating benches placed along the railing
tall contemporary street lighting poles along the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a waterfront promenade at dusk, with a massive roller coaster structure silhouetted against the orange sky on the left. To the right, a modern curved glass building with a palm tree on its roof dominates the foreground. The camera walks steadily forward along the concrete path, passing benches and street lamps, with the water visible beyond the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with city skyline view

events.description: passes the modern glass pavilion on the right, opening up to an unobstructed waterfront view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade with open water views and the city skyline becoming visible ahead

entered.detail: cluster of city buildings and skyscrapers visible across the water against the sunset

segments.scene_description: Having passed the modern building, the scene opens up to reveal the city skyline across the water. The roller coaster track now appears further in the distance on the left, while the path continues straight toward the horizon. The sky darkens to deeper orange and purple hues as street lamps begin to cast more prominent light on the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade end with sculptural rock feature

events.description: approaching the large rock sculpture at the end of the promenade as natural light fades

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the waterfront path near a large sculptural rock formation

entered.detail: large dark rock or sculptural boulder situated at the end of the promenade near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a large rock formation at the end of the promenade, with the city skyline still visible across the water in the distance. The roller coaster structure has fallen behind and out of view, while the path curves slightly toward the waterfront railing. Street lamps now provide the primary illumination as dusk settles into evening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a waterfront promenade as the warm glow of dusk transitions into the artificial illumination of evening. It begins by passing a modern curved glass building with a rooftop palm tree, while a massive roller coaster structure stands silhouetted against an orange sky to the left. As the camera moves past the building, the view opens up to reveal a distant city skyline across the water, with the sky deepening into purple hues and street lamps casting a more prominent light on the concrete path. The scene then shifts as the roller coaster falls behind and out of view, leading the camera toward a large rock formation at the end of the promenade. Finally, the path curves slightly toward the waterfront railing as the natural light fades and the street lamps become the primary source of illumination.
